questions.question: Which Knicks legend famously limped onto the court for Game 7 of the 1970 NBA Finals, inspiring the team to victory?
questions.funFact: Though he only scored the first two baskets of the game, Willis Reed's presence shut down Wilt Chamberlain and shifted the momentum of the entire series.

questions.question: Who holds the record for the most points scored by a Knicks player in a single game at Madison Square Garden with 62 points?
questions.funFact: Carmelo set this franchise and arena record on January 24, 2014, against the Charlotte Bobcats without committing a single turnover.

questions.question: John Starks' famous play known simply as 'The Dunk' occurred against the Indiana Pacers in the 1993 Playoffs.
questions.funFact: False! 'The Dunk' actually occurred against the Chicago Bulls over Horace Grant and Michael Jordan in Game 2 of the 1993 Eastern Conference Finals.

questions.question: Which college program produced the Knicks' core trio of Jalen Brunson, Josh Hart, and Donte DiVincenzo?
questions.funFact: The 'Nova Knicks' won the 2016 NCAA National Championship together before eventually reuniting in New York.

questions.question: Which Knicks legend earned the nickname 'Clyde' due to his flashy style and fedora hats?
questions.funFact: Knicks trainer Danny Whelan gave him the nickname because he wore a fedora similar to Warren Beatty's character in the 1967 movie 'Bonnie and Clyde'.

questions.question: The Knicks won the first-ever NBA Draft Lottery in 1985 to select which Hall of Fame center?
questions.funFact: The 1985 draft lottery involved actual envelopes in a hopper, leading to the infamous 'frozen envelope' conspiracy theory among fans.

questions.question: Jeremy Lin's incredible 2012 breakout stretch known as 'Linsanity' began when he was sleeping on his teammate Landry Fields' couch.
questions.funFact: Lin was an undrafted Harvard grad whose contract was unguaranteed, so he didn't want to sign a lease. He suddenly led the Knicks to a seven-game winning streak.

questions.question: Who did Allan Houston hit his famous game-winning floater against in Game 5 of the 1999 Eastern Conference First Round?
questions.funFact: The shot with 0.8 seconds left made the Knicks only the second 8-seed in NBA history to defeat a 1-seed in the playoffs.

questions.question: Who holds the New York Knicks franchise record for the most career rebounds?
questions.funFact: Ewing holds almost all major Knicks franchise records, including total points, rebounds, blocks, and steals.

questions.question: Knicks superfan Spike Lee famously feuded with Indiana Pacers star Reggie Miller during the 1994 Playoffs.
questions.funFact: Reggie Miller scored 25 points in the fourth quarter of Game 5, constantly exchanging trash talk and the infamous 'choke' sign with Spike Lee sitting courtside.
